typeModal.title: Choose Service Type
typeModal.note: Select the type of healthcare service you need. You can browse available specialists after choosing.

doctor.title: Doctor Appointment
doctor.description: Book a clinic visit or consultation with a licensed doctor.

nurse.title: Nursing Home Service
nurse.description: Request a licensed nurse for home care and specialized nursing.

typeModal.footnoteText: After selecting a service type, you'll be directed to choose your preferred doctor or nurse. You can then book directly from their profile.

modal.openSchedulingDesc: Choose any date and time that suits you. Your request will be sent to the specialist for approval.
modal.reasonPlaceholder: Briefly describe your symptoms or reason

validation.dateUnavailable: Specialist is not available on this day
validation.addressRequired: Address is required for home visits

modal.successHome: Home visit booked successfully! Check My Appointments to track it.
modal.successClinic: Appointment booked successfully! Check My Appointments to track it.
modal.name: Name:
modal.fillRequiredFields: Please fill in all required fields
modal.signInAsPatient: Please sign in as a patient to book an appointment
modal.missingSpecialist: Unable to book: specialist information is missing
modal.alreadyBooked: You already booked an appointment with this doctor on this day.

reschedule.title: Reschedule Appointment
reschedule.successDesc: Your appointment has been successfully rescheduled.
reschedule.homeVisitNotice: Home visit rescheduling requires specialist approval.

cancel.title: Cancel Appointment?
cancel.description: Are you sure you want to cancel this appointment? This action cannot be undone.
